summary: Iteration 8 tested end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 new pytest cases pass (test_iteration8_features.py) + iteration 7 regression 20/20 pass. Verified: GET /chats decorates partner with is_vip/vip_tier/active_frame/active_badge and in_voice_room={room_id,name} when partner is in a live room; GET /users/partners supports min_age/max_age/location combined with gender/online_only/search; POST /chats/{id}/mute toggles muted flag and suppresses partner-message unread increment; DELETE /chats/{id}/messages clears messages and resets last_message. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): Chats tab shows VIP tag next to 'Mei Lin', purple mic badge on avatar, and '🎙️ In voice room' status line (verified live). Search page filter icon (search-filter-btn) toggles collapsible panel (search-filter-panel); age presets (search-age-any/18-25/26-35/36+) and location input (search-location-input) work; active-filter count badge shows. Profile 'About' card (collapse-about) is collapsed by default (About me/Country hidden), expands on tap to show all 5 fields, and Edit auto-expands. Connect search-bar navigates to /search. No blockers found.
critical_code_review_comments: chats.py list_conversations fetches up to 100 live rooms and iterates member dicts to build room_map — O(rooms*members) which is fine now but consider indexing if rooms grow.

users.py list_partners: when only min_age or max_age (no other explicit filter) is present, explicit branch is taken and language-based matching is skipped — this matches the search-screen semantics and is correct.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral users created via /auth/register with prefixes i8_mute_*, i8_clr_*, i8_host_* for chat/mute/clear/voice-room tests. Live voice room created and closed via /rooms/{id}/close after test. No admin config modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. For live in_voice_room testing, demo may have already used the free 1-room-per-day quota if testing hits that path — the iteration 8 test falls back to signing up a fresh user to host the room. Landing page requires clicking 'I already have an account' (or navigate directly to /auth?mode=login). Chats tab list uses testID `chat-room-badge-{convId}` for the purple mic pill.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all iteration 8 features function correctly.
